user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results and features
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for ChatGPT search results; visits allowed sites
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: OAI-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; determines ad relevance
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: OAI-AdsBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training generative AI foundation models; improve safety and usefulness
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for training AI models; general web crawling
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GPTBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered web page visits during ChatGPT and Custom GPT interactions
user_agents.scope: User-initiated actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs; GPT Actions
user_agents.opt_out: Not managed by robots.txt; user-triggered actions, rules may not apply

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collect web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; also supports Crawl-delay directive

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users accessing websites for user-initiated queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch when Claude users ask questions requiring web access
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search result quality and relevance for users
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to index content for search optimization and accuracy
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search index and product-specific crawls
user_agents.scope: General web crawl from common crawlers IP ranges; crawls both desktop and smartphone user agents
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Image crawling for Google Images and Search
user_agents.scope: Fetches images, logos, and favicons for Google products
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Image / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Video crawling for Google Search and video products
user_agents.scope: Fetches video-related content for Google Search features
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Video / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: News content crawling for Google News product
user_agents.scope: Crawls using various Googlebot user agent strings for news.google.com and Google News app
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-News / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Product catalog crawling for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Crawls product data for Google Shopping surfaces and Search shopping tab
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Storebot-Google / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Search Console testing and inspection tool requests
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-InspectionTool / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various internal product teams and research
user_agents.scope: One-off crawls for internal R&D and publicly accessible content fetching
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image URL fetching optimized for image crawling
user_agents.scope: Fetches publicly accessible image URLs for various Google products
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Image / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video URL fetching optimized for video crawling
user_agents.scope: Fetches publicly accessible video URLs for various Google products
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Video / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Vertex AI Agent training data collection requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Crawls for building Vertex AI Agents per site owner requests
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-CloudVertexBot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training data for Gemini models and grounding in Gemini Apps
user_agents.scope: Controls whether crawled content may be used for Gemini model training and grounding at prompt time
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search results indexing; not used for AI foundation model training
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt or block published IP ranges

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered web page fetching for answering user questions
user_agents.scope: User-requested page visits to provide accurate answers; generally ignores robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Block published IP ranges; robots.txt rules generally not honored for user requests

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search features across Apple ecosystem including Spotlight, Siri, and Safari
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing and discovery across Apple products
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: Applebot in robots.txt; also supports robots meta tags (noindex, nosnippet, nofollow)

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Controls whether content can be used to train Apple foundation models for generative AI features
user_agents.scope: Determines data usage permissions for Apple Intelligence, Services, and Developer Tools training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls Apple Podcasts content from registered URLs
user_agents.scope: iTunes/Apple Podcasts content only; does not follow robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Does not respect robots.txt; only crawls registered Apple Podcasts content

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawls shared content from Meta apps to display title, description, and thumbnail
user_agents.scope: Content shared on Facebook, Instagram, or Messenger; fetches Open Graph metadata
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: /; may bypass robots.txt for security checks

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improves Meta AI search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to analyze content for Meta AI enhancement and citation linking
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Crawls web to improve advertising and business-related products
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for advertising and business-related use cases
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetches individual links at user request for agentic AI capabilities
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch to evaluate and help AI navigate websites to complete tasks
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: /; may bypass robots.txt for user-requested fetches

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Web search indexing and crawling
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Bing search index
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Bingbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt or HTTP X-Robots-Tag header

user_agents.name: Slurp
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for search purposes
user_agents.scope: General web indexing

user_agents.name: Adidxbot
user_agents.purpose: Ad-related crawling and indexing
user_agents.scope: Crawls for ad-related content and features

user_agents.name: BingPreview
user_agents.purpose: Preview generation for Bing search results
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for live preview snippets

user_agents.name: MSN Bot
user_agents.purpose: MSN and web content indexing
user_agents.scope: Web crawling for MSN services

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve Amazon products and services; train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors industry standard opt-out directives

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawl content for search eligibility in Alexa and Rufus; does not train generative AI
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors industry standard opt-out directives

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions like live information fetching for Alexa queries
user_agents.scope: Fetch live information for user queries; does not train generative AI models
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors industry standard opt-out directives

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset creation
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to build an Internet archive dataset
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset creation (older version)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to build an Internet archive dataset
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Agentic actors
user_agents.purpose: AI crawlers, browsers, and other automated tools for web automation and data collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl across Cloudflare network; accounts for ~10% of traffic as of March 2026
user_agents.opt_out: Cloudflare Redirects for AI Training allows publishers to redirect verified crawlers to canonical pages; HTTP 402 Payment Required responses via Pay-Per-Crawl feature

user_agents.name: Verified AI crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection and content indexing for AI systems
user_agents.scope: User-specified pages via Cloudflare Redirects for AI Training; subject to Agent Readiness scoring
user_agents.opt_out: Publishers can use Redirects for AI Training to enforce canonical content or block via HTTP 402 Payment Required
